title: Break Free: Two People. Two Years. One Dream
original_title: Reiss Aus - Zwei Menschen. Zwei Jahre. Ein Traum
overview: When Lena and Ulli start the engine of their old Land Rover, Lady Terés, they have a plan: to drive from Hamburg to South Africa in six months. What they don't know yet is that they won't ever get there. Two totally different characters, jammed together in two square meters of space for almost two years, they experience what it really means to travel: leaving your comfort zone for good.
